name: pompelmi
readme_summary: Pompelmi is an open-source, privacy-first file scanning solution for Node.js applications. It focuses on scanning files in memory before they are saved to disk, offering features like YARA rule integration, ZIP bomb protection, and adapters for popular web frameworks.
primary_use_case: Securely scanning uploaded files for malware and threats within Node.js applications without sending data to external services.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital gatekeeper, represented as a stylized, glowing shield, standing before a stream of incoming digital packages. The shield actively inspects each package, with a subtle 'X-ray' effect revealing potential threats within some packages as glowing red icons. Clean, approved packages pass through with a green checkmark. Small, unobtrusive UI elements displaying 'YARA Scan' and 'ZIP Bomb Check' are visible near the gatekeeper. The background is a clean, abstract digital landscape with the 'pompelmi' name subtly integrated into the gate's design. The overall mood is secure and efficient, with a color palette of blues, greens, and subtle reds for threats. Rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and conceptual representation.

name: onWatch
description: Track AI API quotas across Synthetic, Z.ai, Anthropic (Claude Code), Codex, GitHub Copilot & Antigravity in real time. Lightweight background daemon (<50MB RAM), SQLite storage, Material Design 3 dashboard. Zero telemetry.
readme_summary: onWatch is an open-source CLI tool and background agent that monitors AI API quota usage across multiple providers like Synthetic, Z.ai, Anthropic, Codex, GitHub Copilot, and Antigravity in real time. It stores historical data locally in SQLite and provides a Material Design 3 web dashboard for easy visualization, ensuring all data remains on the user's machine with zero telemetry.
key_features: Real-time AI API quota tracking for multiple providers
Zero telemetry, all data stays local
primary_use_case: To provide developers with real-time and historical insights into their AI API quota consumption across various services, helping them manage usage and costs effectively.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital librarian meticulously organizing and tracking glowing energy orbs representing API quotas from different AI services (Synthetic, Z.ai, Anthropic, Copilot, etc.). The librarian is seated at a clean, modern desk with a large, clear dashboard displaying real-time usage graphs and historical trends. Small, subtle icons representing each AI provider are visible on the orbs. The background is a softly lit, organized digital library, conveying a sense of control and insight. The overall mood is calm and informative, with a focus on clarity and data management. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a vibrant, yet organized color palette.

name: Text-Grab
description: Use OCR in Windows quickly and easily with Text Grab. With optional background process and notifications.
readme_summary: Text Grab is a C# Windows utility that uses Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to extract and copy text from any visible content on the screen. It leverages the Windows API for local OCR processing, offering multiple modes for flexible text capture without requiring a constant background process.
key_features: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for screen text
Local OCR processing using Windows API
Full-Screen Grab Mode (select region or click word)
Grab Frame Mode (transparent frame for continuous capture)
Minimal UI and no constant background process
Available via Microsoft Store, GitHub Releases, Scoop, and Chocolatey
primary_use_case: Quickly and easily copying text from images, videos, or application elements on Windows that cannot otherwise be selected.
cover_image_prompt: A digital scribe, represented by a stylized quill pen with glowing circuitry, hovering over a computer screen. The screen displays a jumbled mix of images, application windows, and video frames. As the quill hovers, it magically extracts lines of clear text, which then flow like digital ink into a waiting clipboard icon. Subtle UI elements from the 'Text Grab' application are visible on a small corner of the screen, showing selection boxes and capture modes. The background is a soft, abstract digital landscape with subtle code snippets floating around. The overall mood is efficient and magical, highlighting the effortless extraction of text. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant blue and teal color palette.

name: crosspaste-desktop
readme_summary: CrossPaste Desktop is a cross-platform application that enables seamless clipboard sharing across multiple devices. It supports various data types and ensures privacy with end-to-end encryption and a serverless, LAN-only architecture.
key_features: Rich Type Support (Text, Color, URL, HTML, RTF, Image, File)
primary_use_case: To synchronize clipboard content across different devices (computers) on a local network or via direct connection, allowing users to copy something on one device and paste it on another without manual transfer.
cover_image_prompt: A magical, interconnected network of diverse devices (laptop, desktop, tablet) floating in a serene digital space. From each device, glowing streams of data representing different content types (text snippets, images, files) flow towards a central, stylized clipboard icon. This central clipboard then distributes the content back to the appropriate devices, illustrating seamless, real-time synchronization. Subtle UI elements resembling the CrossPaste application interface are visible on the devices, and the overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and slightly futuristic, emphasizing ease of use and secure data transfer. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, glowing accents against a dark, sophisticated background.
